title: [AI5] Restrict Personal Account Integrations from Team-Wide Access and Enhance Access Control
summary: Added explicit OpenClaw OAuth binding access scopes. Bindings now default to `personal`, service-scoped bindings require `teamWideApproved=true` at upsert, and personal bindings are blocked from being executed into team-wide Cloud Runtime service variables.

runtime_contract.execution_guard: Personal OAuth bindings cannot be executed into team-wide service variables.
